2606.09697.title: PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models
2606.09697.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.
2606.09697.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）經常面臨應該被拒絕的請求，這在有用性和防止傷害之間創造了一種權衡。<lb/>然而，拒絕本身也可以是有幫助的。在涉及危機、脅迫或意圖升級的高風險互動中，直接的拒絕可能會防止直接傷害，但仍然無法支持請求背後的人的需求。<lb/>我們提出了PsychoSafe，一個心理學知識背景的拒絕框架，將拒絕重新構建為基於證據的干預策略的結構化支持性溝通。<lb/>為了開發PsychoSafe，我們構建了一個包含8019個提示-回應對的語料庫，涵蓋五個心理學上顯著的風險領域，並對Qwen 3.5 27B應用提示和參數高效的微調。<lb/>在500個提示的平衡驗證集上，經過LLM評估和人類評級驗證，PsychoSafe提示在整體拒絕質量上比通用基線提高了28.1%，在外部資源轉介（+46.8%）和心理基礎（+34.8%）方面特別強勁，同時保持了在非拒絕任務上的下游表現。<lb/>微調實現了近乎完美的拒絕和資源轉介率，但降低了回應的相關性。<lb/>在SORRY-Bench和XSTest上的額外評估顯示出強大的領域內穩健性，但領域外的泛化能力有限，這表明未來的工作應該多樣化微調數據，以幫助模型選擇性地應用干預，而不是機械地應用。
2606.09697.author: Gianluca Barmina et.al.
2606.09697.authors: Gianluca Barmina, Federico Torrielli, Sven Harms, Jacob Nielsen, Felix Mächtle, Stine Lyngsø Beltoft, Peter Schneider-Kamp, Thomas Eisenbarth, Lukas Galke Poech, Anne Lauscher
